findings.matrix_title: Extra masthead chrome above the actual workbench
findings.notes: Matrix-exact browser/DOM/static assertion passed in full-ui-design-conformance.expected-red.spec.ts; no ID remapping used.

findings.matrix_title: Persistent surface navigation is not part of the design model
findings.notes: Resolved by implementation removal/proof: no nav.surface-nav/tablist/side nav selectors are rendered; TODAY, SOURCE LEDGER, /doctor, and INSPECTOR are command/routed operational surfaces, not a persistent peer-nav strip.
